creator: akua@swiss.coh.akua.com
text:
ZFS on JMicron USB2/eSata drive causes SYNC failures ... roughly 10 or so ... until system panic

Fix: Set quirk flag to stop synch attempts in umass.c .... eSata interface not tested (PCI Express card unsupported yet)
How-To-Repeat: 	Hook up drive, gpart partition per http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2007-April/070616.html, zpool, start copying files, panic
